hooks.command: MLLOG="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/mllog"; [ -f "$MLLOG" ] || MLLOG="$(pwd)/.venv/Scripts/mllog.exe"; [ -f "$MLLOG" ] || exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); ARGS=(capture --type analysis --outcome success --auto); [ -n "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && [ -f "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && ARGS+=(--transcript "$TRANSCRIPT"); "$MLLOG" "${ARGS[@]}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
